creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #2)

I'm hinting that its highly beneficial to be more explicit and provide detail, which goes for everything related to issue/bug tracking. :) This is especially the case non-trivial changes.

tldr: "Leave no (even potential) questions unanswered" makes it much less likely an issue will be ignored and much more likely to promote action/progress.
